scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/server" "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build -w apps/desktop
scripts.package:desktop: npm run build:all && npm run package -w apps/desktop
